mnemonics: To TANH or not to TANH, that is the question
ANN stands for Artificial Neural Network, never forget
keyPoints: Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) are two types of Artificial Neural Networks
ANNs are used in Image Classification, Natural Language Processing, and Speech Recognition
Advantages of ANN include Learning, Adaptability, and Ability to parallelize tasks
Disadvantages of ANN include Slow Training, Overfitting, and Need for large datasets
